# Filesystem Performance Test
# Tests performance with aggressive timeouts

# Build the filesystem server binary
go build -o mcp-filesystem-server .

# Create a temporary test directory
mkdir test_dir
cd test_dir

# Test with aggressive timeout (2 seconds)
timeout 2s exec ../mcp-filesystem-server . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/list","params":{},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"test1.txt","content":"Test content 1"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"test1.txt"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"list_directory","arguments":{"path":"."}},"id":5}
EOF

# Verify operations complete within timeout
stdout '"name":"write_file"'
stdout 'Successfully wrote'
stdout 'Test content 1'
stdout '"name":"test1.txt"'

# Test rapid sequential operations
timeout 3s exec ../mcp-filesystem-server . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"rapid1.txt","content":"Content 1"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"rapid2.txt","content":"Content 2"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"rapid3.txt","content":"Content 3"}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"rapid1.txt"}},"id":6}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"rapid2.txt"}},"id":7}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"rapid3.txt"}},"id":8}
EOF

# Verify rapid operations are handled correctly
stdout 'Content 1'
stdout 'Content 2'
stdout 'Content 3'

# Test with larger content (should still be fast)
timeout 2s exec ../mcp-filesystem-server . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"write_file","arguments":{"path":"large.txt","content":"$(printf 'Large content line %d\n' {1..100})"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_file_info","arguments":{"path":"large.txt"}},"id":4}
EOF

# Verify large file handling
stdout 'Successfully wrote'
stdout '"size"'

# Cleanup
cd ..
rm -rf test_dir
